Class AsyncBatchWriteBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncBatchWriteBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the item type
public class AsyncBatchWriteBuilder<T> extends Object
Builds an async batch write operation to put and delete multiple items in a single table.

Obtain via AsyncTable.batchWrite(). Executes using the async enhanced client and returns a CompletableFuture that completes with the batch write result.

A single batch write can contain up to 25 put and delete operations combined. Unprocessed items are automatically retried with exponential backoff (up to 3 attempts).

      public @NonNull AsyncBatchWriteBuilder<T> delete(@NonNull Object partitionKey, @NonNull Object sortKey)

      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value
      Returns:

    • returnConsumedCapacity

      public @NonNull AsyncBatchWriteBuilder<T> returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
      Configures whether to return consumed capacity information for the operation.
      Parameters:
      returnConsumedCapacity - the consumed capacity reporting level
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<BatchWriteResult> execute()
      Executes the batch write operation asynchronously.

      All puts and deletes added to this builder are sent in a single batch write request. Unprocessed items are automatically retried with exponential backoff (up to 3 attempts).

      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the BatchWriteResult
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if more than 25 items (puts + deletes combined) are provided
